extends: inventory/governance-manifest (Epic #1701 adapter-emit/drift chain) — this catalog EXTENDS, does not fork

metadata.note: Counts are derived programmatically by scripts/global/harness-feature-catalog.js, never hand-asserted. perRuntime cells are seeded 'unverified'; the T1.3 reconciler (#3441) populates them from live state and the T3.1 matrix (#3451) probes them.

features.purpose: SIGTERM/SIGKILL orphaned playwright/node workers with >80% CPU for >5 min; logs to `~/.megingjord/zombie-cleanup.jsonl`

features.name: `canonical_main_wip_check.py`

features.name: Auxiliary `scripts/` subdirectory corpus
features.purpose: Repo-local / IT-fleet / CI surfaces; not per-runtime adapter targets. The full `scripts/` corpus is 8 subdirectories (`fleet`, `global`, `hooks`, `regression`, `tools`, `wiki`, `windows-laptop`, `xteam-mcp`); `global`+`wiki`+`xteam-mcp` are cataloged elsewhere (L5/L6/L8, L7, xteam MCP row). `scripts/regression/` is the replay-eval governance-test surface (canonical example `fleet-hamr-replay.js` replays HAMR fleet traffic), in-scope for the "promotion is replay-eval-gated, not calendar-gated" pattern recurring across §5. Disambiguation: `scripts/hooks/` (git-side `.sh` audit scripts) is distinct from `hooks/scripts/` (the 64-script runtime hook corpus in L3) — must not be conflated.

features.name: G10 EDD / 100-line cap / cyclomatic complexity floor

features.name: Resource-tier vocabulary (T0–T5)
features.purpose: Operator-specific baseline; G5 cross-cuts all features

features.name: Goal-Health Score (GHS) computation
features.purpose: Pure computation over governance signals; shared snapshot

features.name: Actuator engine (7-actuator tier governance)
features.purpose: Reads GHS → writes `~/.megingjord/goal-tier-state.json`; pure function `runActuators()`

features.name: Actuator transitions (hysteresis + cooldown)
features.purpose: `applyTransition()` shared by all 7 actuators

features.name: Actuator epic sync
features.purpose: Sync actuator state to Epic ticket comments for cross-team visibility

features.name: Goal-tier state file

features.name: Goal-tier resolver (hook-side)

features.name: Goal-tier override

features.name: Actuator behavior matrix (A1–A7)
features.purpose: A1: test coverage tier (B→B++++); A2: cross-family review required→advisory; A3: handoff block required; A4: consultant mandatory; A5: operator notification; A6: session reminder; A7: anneal auto-trigger

features.name: GHS dashboard panel

features.name: Anneal-sensor snapshot

features.name: lefthook pre-commit suite
features.purpose: `docs-check-on-package-json` (runs `pre-commit-docs-check.js` when `package.json` changes)
features.promotionPath: human developers: activated by `npx lefthook install`; AI agents: wired via PostToolUse git-commit hooks

features.name: lefthook pre-push suite (15 commands)
features.purpose: Parallel: `branch-name-regex`, `lint-line-cap`, `lint-readability`, `lint-js`, `lint-md`, `lint-py`, `lint-sh`, `megalint`, `hydration-lint`, `closeout-preflight`, `closeout-presence-check`, `git-freshness`, `merged-branch-guard`, `cross-team-lease-gate`, `collaborator-self-check` (`scripts/global/collaborator-self-check.js` — the #2907 hard gate). (`docs-check-on-package-json` is pre-commit, not pre-push; `worktree-teardown-actuate` is post-merge.)
features.promotionPath: AI agents: wired via `worktree_push_gate.py` hook which validates these run before push

features.name: lefthook post-merge (squash-aware teardown)
features.purpose: `worktree-teardown-actuate` — runs `worktree-teardown-actuate.js --apply` after `git pull`/merge to clean up merged worktrees
features.promotionPath: human developer only; AI agents use `npm run worktree:teardown` manually

features.name: Lefthook install path
features.purpose: Must be re-run after repo clone and after `deploy:apply` for each AI agent runtime's local checkout
features.promotionPath: cursor/antigravity: unconfirmed whether lefthook is installed in their worktrees

features.name: Governance profiles registry

features.name: Repo type detector

features.name: Repo-standards router skill
features.purpose: Operator-invoked: routes governance setup decisions to the correct per-profile gate set

features.name: Repo-scope guard
features.purpose: Restrict hook enforcement to configured repo paths; runtime-ordered candidate list

features.name: Profile-keyed lint sets
features.purpose: `agnostic` (line-limit, readability, secret-scan) + `language` (eslint/stylelint/ruff) + `project` (lighthouse/vsce/api-extractor)

features.name: Profile-keyed PR/release gates
features.purpose: `web-app`: visual_qa+lighthouse; `vscode-extension`: extension_test+version_bump+vsce_publish; `cli-library`: unit_tests+api_compat+semver_check

features.name: EDD contract definition (GOV-009)
features.purpose: All runtimes must produce an `## EDD` comment block on `lane:code-change` tickets

features.name: EDD validator (megalint)
features.purpose: CI-invoked; validates: `scope:`, `acceptance:`, `risk:`, `implementation-plan:` fields present; exempt lanes: trivial, config-only, docs-research, no-code-remediation

features.name: EDD CI gate
features.purpose: Universal CI backstop; reads PR body for `Refs #N`, fetches linked issue comments, calls `edd-required.js`; fails PR if EDD absent on non-exempt lane

features.name: EDD comment contract (`## EDD` marker)
features.purpose: Operator (any runtime) must post the `## EDD` comment on the linked issue before pushing; `edd-required.js` re-runs after posting resolves the gate

features.name: EDD local pre-push check
features.purpose: Local megalint run during pre-push catches EDD absence before CI; depends on `CLOSEOUT_CHECK_BLOCK` / `COLLABORATOR_SELF_CHECK_INPUT` env vars

features.name: Authorization profile schema
features.purpose: 3 named profiles: `owner`, `guarded`, `restricted`; 5 required capability fields: `install`, `upgrade`, `privileged`, `execute_local`, `execute_remote`

features.name: Authorization profile resolver (JS)
features.purpose: Resolution order: CLI flag > env var > config file > default; `parseActiveProfile()` validates schema

features.name: Authorization profile context (JS)
features.purpose: Builds operator context string injected into session context

features.name: Authorization profile enforcer (Python hook)
features.purpose: PreToolUse: cap tool calls to active profile's capability set; config-driven; fail-open
features.promotionPath: wired pretool_guard; antigravity/cursor wiring unconfirmed

features.name: Authorization profile enforcer (JS)
features.purpose: JS parity of Python enforcer; consumed by megalint / CI context

features.name: Authorization-profile instruction

features.name: Conformance spec
features.purpose: Contract test: JS resolver + enforcer must agree on all 3 profiles × 5 capabilities

features.name: Operator-ownership rule loader

features.name: Operator-ownership evaluator

features.name: Delegation-phrase lint
